screens.title: NexGen Roofing Home
screens.prompt:
Title: NexGen Roofing Home
Context: Construction and roofing services website for NexGen Roofing.
Description of the screen: A modern and professional homepage for NexGen Roofing and Construction. The hero section features a high-quality image of a sleek metal roof with the headline 'NexGen Roofing And Construction' and the subheadline 'Licensed And Insured For All Types Of Roofing Work'. A clear 'Get a Quote' CTA button is prominent. Below the hero, three feature cards highlight 'Customer Satisfaction', 'Licensed, Insured And Bonded', and 'Quality And Efficiency' using industry-relevant icons. The layout uses a clean white, navy blue, and industrial grey color palette. A brief 'About Us' summary follows with professional imagery of roofing tools or a finished project. The footer includes contact details and quick links.
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
screens.name: projects/16779982386894283053/screens/8c34c416ff65462e823a6243106c52aa

screens.title: NexGen Roofing Services
screens.prompt:
Title: NexGen Roofing Services
Context: Construction and roofing services website for NexGen Roofing.
Description of the screen: Detailed services page for NexGen Roofing. The page is divided into clear sections with bold headings: 'Roof Plumbing', 'Carpentry & Construction', and 'General Services'. Each section uses a grid or list layout with icons for items like 'New roof construction', 'Guttering', and 'Project Managing'. The design maintains the professional navy and grey theme. High-quality photos of Colorbond roofing and timber structures are interspersed to break up text. A sticky 'Request Service' button is visible at the bottom.
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
screens.name: projects/16779982386894283053/screens/be12cc526c2d4564850a497f0f395fa1

screens.title: NexGen Roofing About Us
screens.prompt:
Title: NexGen Roofing About Us
Context: Construction and roofing services website for NexGen Roofing.
Description of the screen: About Us page for NexGen Roofing. It begins with 'Our Story' featuring a photo of the local Darwin landscape or a professional team shot. Sections include 'Contact Information' with clickable phone and email links, 'Operating Hours' in a clean table format, and a 'FAQs' accordion section. A dedicated 'Testimonials' or 'Reviews' slider at the bottom showcases positive customer feedback with star ratings. The tone is trustworthy and community-focused.
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
screens.name: projects/16779982386894283053/screens/c3fd2ae779bb4a0594c50ed51d8e7d18

outputComponents.text:
The designs for NexGen Roofing have been generated:

- **NexGen Roofing Home**: A professional homepage featuring a strong hero section, core value cards for trust, and a clear call-to-action for quotes.
- **NexGen Roofing Services**: A comprehensive breakdown of roof plumbing, carpentry, and general construction services using a clean, icon-based grid layout.
- **NexGen Roofing About Us**: A trust-building page including the company's story, clear contact information, operating hours, and a dedicated FAQ and reviews section.

Would you like to adjust the color scheme or add a "Request a Quote" form to any of these pages?

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a "Request a Quote" contact form screen.
